message:
style: apply cargo fmt to semantic indexer and fuzz corpus

Pure formatting normalization produced by cargo fmt — no behavioral
change.

- src/indexer/semantic.rs: collapse split source_id_hash binding onto
  one line; collapse a split ConversationPacket::from_canonical_replay
  call; collapse a trivial packet_inputs.iter().all() assertion; and
  split the expected_hash equality assertion across three lines so its
  iterator chain stays below rustfmt's width limit.
- tests/golden_fuzz_corpus.rs: rewrap the SUBCOMMANDS slice so each
  literal sits on its own line (matches the LONG_FLAGS / STRING_ARGS
  style in the same file).

Formatting drift had accumulated from several in-place edits that
were not run through cargo fmt before commit; landing this keeps
cargo fmt --check green independent of the pdg22 test work.

files.patch:
@@ -17,9 +17,27 @@ use coding_agent_search::parse_cli;
 use std::path::PathBuf;
 
 const SUBCOMMANDS: &[&str] = &[
-    "search", "find", "query", "q", "stats", "ls", "list", "index", "diag", "status", "doctor",
-    "daemon", "analytics", "robot-docs", "introspect", "api-version", "models", "detect", "pages",
-    "bakeoff", "setup",

+    "find",
